en_title: Elden Ring Tarnished Edition Has a Nintendo Switch 2 Release Date, Additional Content Also Available to Buy on Other Platforms
cn_title: 《任天堂》《Nintendo Switch 2》《艾尔登法环》褪色者版8月28日登陆Switch 2
subtitle: 褪色者归来
opus_summary: From Software宣布《艾尔登法环》褪色者版将于2026年8月28日登陆Nintendo Switch 2，售价79.99美元(约合人民币572元)，包含本体、黄金树之影DLC、新武器、灵马护甲皮肤及两个新初始职业。同日，褪色者包DLC也将登陆PS4、PS5、Xbox One、Xbox Series及PC平台，售价预计5美元(约合人民币36元)。此前Switch 2版因性能调整从2025年延期至今年，IGN曾在科隆游戏展上体验后指出掌机模式帧率严重下降、操作混乱。希望8月发售时这些问题已解决。本作全球销量已突破3000万份，而From Software今年还有Switch 2独占新作《The Duskbloods》，宫崎英高此前表示暂未考虑《艾尔登法环2》，但有一部电影正在制作中。

paragraphs.en: Elden Ring Tarnished Edition launches on Nintendo Switch 2 on August 28, 2026, FromSoftware has announced. The additional content included in the Tarnished Edition will also be available to buy on other platforms on the same day via the Tarnished Pack DLC.
paragraphs.cn: From Software宣布，《艾尔登法环》褪色者版将于2026年8月28日登陆Nintendo Switch 2。褪色者版中包含的额外内容也将在同日通过褪色者包DLC在其他平台发售。

paragraphs.en: The $79.99 Tarnished Edition includes the base game, the Shadow of the Erdtree expansion, new weapons, and the ability to customize Torrent, players’ faithful Spectral Steed, with armor skins. Also included are two new starting classes.
paragraphs.cn: 79.99美元(约合人民币572元)的褪色者版包含游戏本体、《黄金树之影》DLC、新武器、以及为玩家忠实的灵马托雷特更换护甲皮肤的功能。此外还包含两个新初始职业。

paragraphs.en: Publisher Bandai Namco said the new content will also be available to purchase for PlayStation 4, PlayStation 5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X and S, and PC via Steam. It hasn't said how much the Tarnished Pack DLC will cost, but most expect a $5 price point.
paragraphs.cn: 发行商万代南梦宫表示，新内容也将登陆PS4、PS5、Xbox One、Xbox Series X|S以及PC（Steam）平台。官方尚未公布褪色者包DLC的售价，但多数人预计为5美元(约合人民币36元)。

paragraphs.en: Originally planned for a 2025 launch, the Switch 2 version of FromSoftware’s 2022 Game of the Year-winning fantasy RPG was delayed to this year to “allow time for performance adjustments." Most took that to mean a focus on the technical concerns that were raised by those who played Tarnished Edition on Switch 2 in a pre-launch state.
paragraphs.cn: From Software这款2022年年度最佳幻想RPG的Switch 2版原计划2025年发售，后被推迟至今年，以「留出时间进行性能调整」。多数人认为这意味着重点解决那些在预发布状态下体验过Switch 2版褪色者版的玩家所提出的技术问题。

paragraphs.en: This was something IGN had first-hand experience of, having called Elden Ring on Switch 2 “ a disaster in handheld mode ” after checking it out at gamescom last year. Performance was said to suffer in particular when exploring the world. We noted that “frame rate drops were significant when turning the camera whilst exploring outside of the tutorial area, and this, combined with a confusing button layout on Switch 2, made combat confusing and exploration fairly dispiriting.”
paragraphs.cn: IGN对此有切身体会——去年在科隆游戏展上体验后，我们称Switch 2版《艾尔登法环》「掌机模式是一场灾难」。据称在世界探索时性能尤其糟糕。我们指出：「在教程区域外探索时转动视角，帧率下降非常明显，再加上Switch 2令人困惑的按键布局，导致战斗混乱、探索相当令人沮丧。」

paragraphs.en: Fingers crossed those performance issues were ironed out for this August's launch.
paragraphs.cn: 希望这些性能问题在8月发售时已经得到解决。

paragraphs.en: Elden Ring's arrival on Switch 2 rounds out the possible platforms for the game, which has sold a huge 30 million copies worldwide, With the multiplayer spinoff Elden Ring: Nightreign now over a year old, fans are wondering what's next from FromSoftware beyond this year's Switch 2 exclusive The Duskbloods. Could Elden Ring 2 be in the works? In December 2024, Elden Ring director and FromSoftware president Hidetaka Miyazaki said the developer was not considering making Elden Ring 2 , but wouldn't shut down the possibility in the future. If not, there is an Elden Ring movie in the works.
paragraphs.cn: 《艾尔登法环》登陆Switch 2标志着该游戏已覆盖所有可能平台，本作全球销量已高达3000万份。随着多人衍生作《艾尔登法环：黑夜君临》发售已超过一年，粉丝们好奇From Software在今年Switch 2独占作品《The Duskbloods》之后还有什么计划。《艾尔登法环2》是否在开发中？2024年12月，《艾尔登法环》总监兼From Software社长宫崎英高表示，开发商暂未考虑制作《艾尔登法环2》，但不会排除未来可能性。如果不出续作，还有一部《艾尔登法环》电影正在制作中。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley是IGN新闻总监。你可以在X上通过@wyp100找到他，或通过wesley_yinpoole@ign.com联系，也可匿名发送至wyp100@proton.me。
